1 ?06 0000111101 5
2 ?17 1000110011 5

Constant
1 C 1 1111111111 a mismatch

1 I 0 1001000100 3 mismatch
1 I 0n 0110111011 7 mismatch

1 AND 06 1001000000 2 mismatch

1 XOR 06 0000111101 5 match 1/2

0 I 5
1 XOR 06

7 I 6

Applying to 11110100
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 5 = 1
1 XOR 06 = XOR(I 0,I 6) = XOR(1,0) = 1
2 XOR 17 = XOR(I 1,I 7) = XOR(1,0) = 1
3 I 2 = 1
4 I 3 = 1
5 I 4 = 0
6 I 5 = 1
7 I 6 = 0

\boxed{11111010}
